Package io.vertigo.database.timeseries

Class MeasureBuilder

java.lang.Object
io.vertigo.database.timeseries.MeasureBuilder
All Implemented Interfaces:
io.vertigo.core.lang.Builder<Measure>
public final class MeasureBuilder extends Object implements io.vertigo.core.lang.Builder<Measure>
Builder for a new Point.
